title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Fears of AI-driven DeFi hack epidemic overstated for now — but not for long
summary: Fears of AI-driven DeFi hack epidemic overstated for now — but not for long
briefing: Are the fears of an AI driven hacking epidemic totally overblown, or is this just the lull before the storm?

title: Strategy-led group pledges $15M to quantum-proof Bitcoin network
summary: Strategy-led group pledges $15M to quantum-proof Bitcoin network
briefing: A consortium led by Strategy and BlackRock has pledged $15 million to secure the Bitcoin network from the threat of a quantum computing breakthrough.

title: Binance joins STOP THE TRAFFIK in anti-human trafficking effort
summary: Binance joins STOP THE TRAFFIK in anti-human trafficking effort
briefing: The partnership expands Binance’s compliance efforts by providing intelligence and training to help detect cryptocurrency activity tied to human trafficking and child exploitation.

title: Bitget secures license for New Zealand expansion
summary: Bitget secures license for New Zealand expansion
briefing: Crypto exchange Bitget said it was registered as a financial service provider with New Zealand’s financial regulator, enabling it to expand its services in the country.

title: BitMEX token crashes 90% as exchange announces shutdown
summary: BitMEX token crashes 90% as exchange announces shutdown
briefing: BitMEX’s BMEX token plunged about 90% after the exchange announced plans to shut down, ending nearly 12 years in business as its Bitcoin futures market share shrank.

title: Bernstein says Bitcoin mining deals necessary for AI power crunch
summary: Bernstein says Bitcoin mining deals necessary for AI power crunch
briefing: Bernstein analysts remain bullish on the Bitcoin mining sector, as deals with third-party providers will be necessary to address the computing power limits of AI data centers.

title: HYPE falls as crypto funds queue nearly $150M in locked tokens for withdrawal
summary: HYPE falls as crypto funds queue nearly $150M in locked tokens for withdrawal
briefing: HYPE briefly fell 8% from its local highs as Multicoin Capital, Selini Capital and Galaxy Digital queued nearly $150 million of the token for withdrawals.

title: BlackRock, Coinbase and Strategy Pledge $15M to Quantum-Proof Bitcoin
summary: BlackRock, Coinbase and Strategy Pledge $15M to Quantum-Proof Bitcoin
briefing: Nine of the biggest institutional names in Bitcoin formed a consortium to fund the developers working to keep the network secure—including from future quantum computers.

title: Southeast Asian Scam Networks Cost Victims Up to $114B in a Year: UN
summary: Southeast Asian Scam Networks Cost Victims Up to $114B in a Year: UN
briefing: Once-fragmented syndicates have fused into a single, tech-driven criminal economy that increasingly runs on crypto, the UNODC warns.

title: Morning Minute: Wall Street Moving Onchain Will Drive the Next Bull Market
summary: Morning Minute: Wall Street Moving Onchain Will Drive the Next Bull Market
briefing: At least that's what Bitwise's CIO believes. Plus Republicans publish new Clarity Act draft, and the SEC Commissioner has a warning for DeFi.

title: Crypto 'Wrench Attacks' Cost Victims $124M in Six Months, Up 12x: CertiK
summary: Crypto 'Wrench Attacks' Cost Victims $124M in Six Months, Up 12x: CertiK
briefing: Physical attacks on crypto holders are increasingly happening at home, and France has become the epicenter, a new report finds.

title: Arbitrum Perp DEX AFX Trade Drained of $24M, Offers Hacker 30% to Return It
summary: Arbitrum Perp DEX AFX Trade Drained of $24M, Offers Hacker 30% to Return It
briefing: The exploit hit a custody bridge AFX operates rather than the Arbitrum network itself, with the stolen funds quickly moved to Ethereum.

title: BitMEX to Close on September 23, Halts New Sign-Ups
summary: BitMEX to Close on September 23, Halts New Sign-Ups
briefing: The crypto derivatives pioneer told users to close positions and withdraw funds before it goes dark on September 23.

title: Coinbase Wants to Be Canada's One-Stop Shop for Stocks, Crypto and Prediction Markets
summary: Coinbase Wants to Be Canada's One-Stop Shop for Stocks, Crypto and Prediction Markets
briefing: The company's "Everything Exchange" is heading north. No launch date set yet, but the Coinbase Canada CEO says phase two for the company is in motion.

title: Kraken Parent Company Makes Moves to Offer xStocks From Global Markets
summary: Kraken Parent Company Makes Moves to Offer xStocks From Global Markets
briefing: Payward and fintech GTN are teaming up to bring xStocks—blockchain-based copies of real company shares—to Hong Kong, the UK, Europe, and South Korea.
